name: contree
description: Test trees as living requirements — TDD with auto-synced specifications in CLAUDE.md

interface.shortDescription: Test trees as the contract: change → sync → tdd, agent-driven.
interface.longDescription: Contree treats test trees as living requirements. Skills set expected behaviour (change), find drift (sync), close gaps with one failing test at a time (tdd), bootstrap a project (setup), or run the full arc end-to-end (workflow).
defaultPrompt: I want to add a feature — let's start with the test trees.
Check whether our test trees and code have drifted apart.
